---
title: "Review of Communicating National Image Through Development and Diplomacy - International Journal of Communication"
date: 2019-06
author:
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
categories: [public diplomacy, country image, reputation, 2019]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan*</strong> (2019), "Review of the book [James Pamment and Karin Gwinn Wilkins (Eds.) (2018), Communicating National Image Through Development and Diplomacy: The Politics of Foreign Aid, Palgrave Macmillan]," <em>International Journal of Communication</em>: 13: 2351-2354,  <a href="https://ijoc.org/index.php/ijoc/article/view/12076/2664"><code>link</code></a>

#image:
#draft: true
---


## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@article{ayhan_book_2019,
	title = {[{Book} {Review} for {James} {Pamment} and {Karin} {Gwinn} {Wilkins} ({Eds}.) (2018). {Communicating} {National} {Image} through {Development} and {Diplomacy}: {The} {Politics} of {Foreign} {Aid}. {Palgrave} {Macmillan}].},
	volume = {13},
	journal = {International Journal of Communication},
	author = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun},
	year = {2019},
	note = {Type: Book review},
	pages = {1--4},
}
```
